# CyberQuest Summer Camp

> A free, five-day cybersecurity summer camp for middle and high school students by Devharsh Trivedi (Bowie State University). Hands-on Python, cryptography, web and AI security, and Capture The Flag, taught with interactive browser slide decks and Jupyter notebooks. No paid tools required.

## What it covers
- Day 1: Python and the Linux command line (CodeCombat, OverTheWire Bandit)
- Day 2: Security foundations and strong passwords; the CIA triad (Google Interland, Security.org)
- Day 3: Cryptography - encoding, ciphers, hashing, RSA (dcode.fr, CyberChef)
- Day 4: Web security and AI security - SQL injection, XSS, prompt injection (CTFLearn, Lakera Gandalf)
- Day 5: Capstone - Capture The Flag and OSINT (picoCTF, OSINT Framework)

## Format
- Main course deck: Interactive_Slides.html (responsive, swipe on mobile, arrow keys on desktop)
- Five day decks: DayN/DayN_slides.html
- Five notebooks: DayN/DayN.ipynb (open free in Google Colab)

## Links
- Live site: https://camp.com.puter.tips/
- Source: https://github.com/devharsh/cyberquest-camp
- Author: Devharsh Trivedi, Ph.D., CISSP, ORCID 0000-0001-6374-7249

## Use
Free for educational use under the MIT license. Suitable for classrooms, clubs, and self-study.
